headline: A Russian-speaking credential-theft campaign dubbed FortiBleed has compromised 86,644 Fortinet devices, about half the internet-facing fleet, as Microsoft's AutoJack research exposes AI browsing agents as a fresh path to host code execution.

emerging_trends.text: Researchers keep turning AI browsing agents from helpers into weapons, and Microsoft's AutoJack chain shows a single web page can ride an agent straight to code execution on the user's own machine.
emerging_trends.topic_title: AutoJack Turns AI Browser Agents Into a Code-Execution Vector

emerging_trends.text: Attackers increasingly mass-harvest credentials from the very edge appliances meant to defend networks, and the FortiBleed haul of 86,644 Fortinet devices marks the largest such sweep this year.
One stolen integration token now cascades across every connected SaaS platform, and the Icarus group's claim on the Klue OAuth breach shows extortion crews chasing that domino effect into Salesforce.
emerging_trends.topic_title: Icarus Group Claims Klue OAuth Breach

topics.title: FortiBleed Compromises 86,644 Fortinet Devices
topics.latest_developments: CISA on June 19 urged FortiGate owners to act as the compromised-device count reached 86,644, roughly half the internet-accessible Fortinet firewalls and VPNs, blamed the sweep on Russian-speaking actors, and Palo Alto Networks Unit 42 published guidance for preparing against large-scale credential attacks.
topics.summary: FortiBleed is a mass credential-theft campaign harvesting login data from internet-facing Fortinet FortiGate firewalls and VPN gateways across government and private networks. Operators should rotate every credential and harden exposed devices.

sources.title: CISA Warns Fortinet Customers as FortiBleed Hits 86,644 FortiGate Devices
FortiBleed: 86,000 Fortinet Device Credentials Compromised
Threat Brief: Mitigating Large-Scale Credential Attacks

topics.title: Macron Presses Democracies to Govern Advanced AI
topics.latest_developments: French President Emmanuel Macron urged the world's wealthy democracies to cooperate on regulating advanced AI and asked the United States to share its cutting-edge systems, the same day Bruce Schneier argued that Washington's export ban on Anthropic's Fable model fails because the broad trend of rising AI capability drives the danger.
topics.summary: Governments are scrambling to govern frontier models after the U.S. classified Anthropic's Fable as an export-controlled munition and cut off foreign access. Policymakers face pressure to coordinate rules rather than wall off individual models.

sources.title: French President Urges US to Share Cutting-Edge AI and Democracies to Cooperate on Regulation
Anthropic’s Fable and the State of AI

topics.title: Icarus Group Claims Klue OAuth Breach
topics.latest_developments: Klue publicly confirmed that attackers stole OAuth tokens connecting to customers' Salesforce environments as a new extortion crew calling itself Icarus claimed the attack and the victim list kept growing, with Huntress detailing on June 18 how one compromised integration credential cascaded into customer-data theft across connected platforms.
topics.summary: Klue is a market-intelligence platform that integrates CRM and sales data across business tools, and its breach spilled connected-Salesforce data for victims including Huntress and Recorded Future. Affected customers should revoke Klue OAuth tokens and audit Salesforce access logs.

sources.title: Klue OAuth breach victim list grows as Icarus hackers claim attack
Klue breach lead to Salesforce data theft, Huntress affected

topics.title: Gravity SMTP WordPress Plugin Under Active Exploitation
topics.latest_developments: Threat actors are exploiting an unauthenticated information-disclosure vulnerability in the Gravity SMTP WordPress plugin, which runs on 100,000 sites, to pull sensitive data without logging in.
topics.summary: Gravity SMTP routes outbound mail for WordPress sites, and the flaw exposes information to any anonymous visitor. Administrators should update the plugin immediately and review logs for unauthorized access.

sources.title: Hackers exploit info disclosure bug in Gravity SMTP WordPress plugin

topics.title: AutoJack Turns AI Browser Agents Into a Code-Execution Vector
topics.latest_developments: Microsoft researchers disclosed AutoJack, an exploit chain that steers an AI browsing agent to an attacker's web page whose JavaScript reaches a privileged local service on the same machine and spawns a process on the host, requiring no credentials, no sign-in, and no further user interaction once the agent loads the page.
topics.summary: AutoJack converts agentic browsers into remote-code-execution delivery vehicles on the user's own computer. Teams deploying AI browsing agents should wall the agents off from privileged local services.

sources.title: AutoJack Attack Lets One Web Page Hijack AI Agent for Host Code Execution

topics.title: CryptoBandits Malware Blends Theft With a Tor Backdoor
topics.latest_developments: SecurityWeek detailed CryptoBandits, malware that pairs cryptocurrency theft with a backdoor, routing its traffic through a local SOCKS5 proxy and abusing Tor to enable remote code execution on infected machines.
topics.summary: CryptoBandits steals cryptocurrency while granting attackers hidden remote control over the victim's system through Tor-anonymized channels. Defenders should watch for unexpected local SOCKS5 proxies and Tor connections.

sources.title: CryptoBandits Malware Doubles as a Backdoor, Abuses Tor

weather: Today: Mostly Sunny then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms, high 78F.
Tonight: Slight Chance Showers And Thunderstorms then Partly Cloudy, low 58F.

games.recap: Fulford's pinch 2-run double in 8th lifts Rockies past Pirates 4-3, Freeland reaches 1,000 Ks

business_politics.title: Israel-Hezbollah Ceasefire, Iran Talks Postponed
business_politics.latest_developments: Israel and Hezbollah agreed a renewed ceasefire Friday after fighting killed four Israeli soldiers and dozens in Lebanon, and Washington postponed the next phase of Iran negotiations when Vice President JD Vance scrapped his Switzerland trip, pushing oil lower.
business_politics.summary: The U.S.-Iran accord signed June 18 reopened the Strait of Hormuz and cleared Tehran to sell oil on the open market for the first time since 2018; fresh Israel-Hezbollah combat in Lebanon now imperils the deal's nuclear-talks phase that Vance planned to attend.

sources.title: Israel, Hezbollah Agree to Renewed Ceasefire as Iran Peace Talks Postponed
Israel and Hizbollah agree ceasefire
How Fresh Middle East Violence Scuttled the Next Phase of Iran Talks

business_politics.title: Starmer Faces Cabinet Mutiny After By-Election Loss
business_politics.latest_developments: Andy Burnham won the Makerfield by-election Friday over Nigel Farage's Reform UK, intensifying pressure on Prime Minister Keir Starmer to resign as Labour MPs warn they will lose their seats and bond markets seek reassurance over worsening UK finances.
business_politics.summary: Outgoing Greater Manchester mayor Andy Burnham beat Reform UK in the Makerfield by-election, casting himself as Starmer's likeliest successor; the Labour leadership crisis lands as UK public finances deteriorate and gilt investors look for stability.

sources.title: Starmer under growing pressure to quit after Burnham's by-election victory
Labour MPs fear they will lose their seats if Starmer remains in Number 10

business.title: Café Momentum Founder Named Time Visionary
business.latest_developments: Time placed Chad Houser, founder and chief executive of Café Momentum, on its inaugural Visionaries list recognizing leaders driving impact in children's lives.
business.summary: Café Momentum, a downtown Pittsburgh restaurant that hires and mentors justice-involved young people and ranks among western Pennsylvania's best per the Post-Gazette, earned national recognition for founder Chad Houser's work.

sources.title: Café Momentum founder named to Time's inaugural Visionaries list

business.title: Most Area Communities Are Losing Residents
business.latest_developments: A Post-Gazette analysis found most Pittsburgh-area communities have shed residents and argues the decline may carry an upside for the region.
business.summary: The Post-Gazette examined population trends across the Pittsburgh metropolitan area, documenting steady resident losses in most municipalities and making the case that shrinkage need not signal regional failure.

sources.title: Analysis: Most Pittsburgh-area communities are losing residents — here's why that might be OK

around_town.title: National Aviary Adds a Harpy Eagle
around_town.latest_developments: The National Aviary on Pittsburgh's North Side introduced a harpy eagle, which staff call a once-in-a-lifetime species to see.
around_town.summary: The National Aviary, the country's only independent nonprofit zoo dedicated to birds, added a harpy eagle—one of the world's largest and most powerful raptors—to its North Side collection.

sources.title: New harpy eagle at the Aviary is a 'once-in-a-lifetime species to see'

around_town.title: Four Sets of Triplets at West Penn
around_town.latest_developments: Allegheny Health Network's West Penn Hospital announced Friday it recently delivered four sets of triplets, all cared for in its Level 3 neonatal intensive care unit.
around_town.summary: West Penn Hospital in Bloomfield, which operates a Level 3 NICU, welcomed four sets of triplets in a short span, sending the newborns for added support before they went home with their families.

sources.title: 4 sets of triplets born at hospital in Pittsburgh
Four moms welcome triplets at Pittsburgh's West Penn Hospital

around_town.title: McKees Rocks Police Address Teen Takeovers
around_town.latest_developments: The McKees Rocks Police Department said it has answered several 'teen takeovers' at vacant properties, part of a trend spreading across the country.
around_town.summary: Police in McKees Rocks, the Allegheny County borough along the Ohio River, reported responding to large unplanned youth gatherings at empty buildings and weighed how to manage them.

sources.title: McKees Rocks Police say they have been called to several 'teen takeovers' at vacant properties

events.title: South Side Street Fest Launches Tonight
events.latest_developments: The inaugural South Side Street Fest opens tonight, Saturday, June 20, with East Carson Street closing for live music and entertainment from 10 p.m. to 2 a.m.
events.summary: The South Side Hospitality Partnership holds the first South Side Street Fest on Saturday, June 20, 2026, shutting East Carson Street in the South Side to traffic for live music from 10 p.m. to 2 a.m.; Pennsylvania granted $125,000 to fund private security for the adults-only event.

sources.title: South Side Street Fest launches Saturday along East Carson Street
South Side community shows some excitement before first Street Fest

events.title: Juneteenth Parade Downtown Saturday
events.latest_developments: The Western PA Juneteenth and Black Music Celebration stages its downtown parade Saturday, June 20, with festival programming at Point State Park and Market Square running through Sunday, June 21.
events.summary: Stop the Violence Pittsburgh's four-day Western PA Juneteenth and Black Music Celebration, billed as the largest in North America, runs 11 a.m. to 10 p.m. at Point State Park, Market Square, and along Liberty Avenue downtown through Sunday, June 21, with a parade Saturday, June 20.

sources.title: Juneteenth returns to downtown Pittsburgh to celebrate freedom, diversity
14+ things to do this weekend, from Juneteenth and Monster Jam to Summer Splash and Bubblesburgh

around_teams.title: Pirates' Catching Plan After Bart Trade
around_teams.latest_developments: A June 19 Post-Gazette mailbag laid out how the Pirates fill catcher after dealing Joey Bart to Atlanta, leaning on Henry Davis and Endy Rodriguez, and weighed whether designated hitter Marcell Ozuna returns.
around_teams.summary: Following the June 18 trade that sent catcher Joey Bart to the Braves for reliever Hunter Stratton, Post-Gazette beat writers fielded reader questions on Pittsburgh's catching depth and Marcell Ozuna's future with the club.

sources.title: Pirates mailbag: What's the plan at catcher after the Joey Bart trade? Is Marcell Ozuna back?

around_teams.title: SNR Drive on Breakouts and Trade Targets
around_teams.latest_developments: On the June 19 SNR Drive, Steelers analysts Matt Williamson and Wes Uhler broke down ESPN's Ben Solak on five 2025 breakout candidates and five 'cliff falls,' surveyed leaguewide trade candidates, and answered a Steelers Q&A heading into 2026.
around_teams.summary: The Pittsburgh Steelers' SNR Drive show, hosted by Matt Williamson and Wes Uhler, dissected projected NFL risers and decliners and ran a viewer question session on the team's roster ahead of training camp.

sources.title: Breakouts & Cliff Falls + Steelers Q&A Heading Into 2026 | SNR Drive (June.19)

team_usa.title: USMNT Reaches Round of 32
team_usa.latest_developments: The U.S. men beat Australia 2-0 in Seattle on Friday without the injured Christian Pulisic, clinching a Round of 32 berth and topping Group D after Paraguay edged Turkey 1-0.
team_usa.summary: The United States men's national team, co-hosting the 2026 World Cup, defeated Australia 2-0 in Seattle to advance from the group stage; a calf injury kept captain Christian Pulisic out as Ricardo Pepi and the supporting cast carried the attack.

sources.title: Pulisic sits but U.S. finds a way to reach KO rounds
U.S. clinches WC Group D after Paraguay victory

team_usa.title: Alex Freeman's First U.S. Goal
team_usa.latest_developments: U.S. defender Alex Freeman, the 21-year-old son of former Packers receiver Antonio Freeman, scored his first international goal in Friday's win over Australia, a strike VAR confirmed onside.
team_usa.summary: Alex Freeman put the U.S. up 2-0 against Australia in Seattle, scoring on the same field where his father, Antonio Freeman Jr., starred for the Green Bay Packers, a moment Freeman called a full-circle family one.

sources.title: Freeman goal for U.S. 'full circle family moment'
Why Alex Freeman's USMNT goal wasn't offside

team_usa.title: Kate Douglass Sets 50 Freestyle Record
team_usa.latest_developments: Kate Douglass broke the women's 50-meter freestyle world record Friday, winning the TYR Pro Swim Series final in 23.59 seconds.
team_usa.summary: U.S. Olympic swimmer Kate Douglass clocked 23.59 in the 50-meter freestyle at the TYR Pro Swim Series, bettering the 23.61 mark Sweden's Sarah Sjostrom set in July 2023.

sources.title: Douglass breaks women's 50m freestyle record

reading.author: Ed Zitron
reading.title: Premium: The Silicon Valley Bubble (Part 2)
reading.summary: Zitron extends his case that Silicon Valley sits atop an AI bubble, building on his exclusive that OpenAI spent $34 billion against $13.07 billion in revenue and arguing the leading model makers lack any path to profitability.

reading.author: Stratechery
reading.title: An Interview with Michael Morton About E-Commerce in the Age of AI
reading.summary: Ben Thompson and Michael Morton discuss how AI reshapes online retail, weighing distribution versus referral models, the difficulty of unfalsifiable bear cases, and the roles of grocery and autonomous vehicles.

reading.author: Cal Newport
reading.title: AI Isn't Breaking Work. It's Already Broken.
reading.summary: Responding to a Financial Times interview with Work AI Institute head Rebecca Hinds about a 6,000-person survey, Newport argues that knowledge work's dysfunctions predate AI and that the technology merely exposes problems already present.

sports_media: Not Just Football with Cam Heyward
